summary: List Copilot Spaces for a user
description:
Lists Copilot Spaces owned by a user. The authenticated user must have read access to the user's Copilot Spaces.

Only Spaces that are readable by the authenticated user are returned. This includes the user's own spaces, and public user spaces when accessing another user's spaces.

OAuth app tokens and personal access tokens (classic) need the `read:user` scope to use this endpoint.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page (max 100).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: A cursor, as given in the [Link header](https://docs.github.com/rest/guides/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api#using-link-headers). If specified, the query only searches for results before this cursor.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: A cursor, as given in the [Link header](https://docs.github.com/rest/guides/using-pagination-in-the-rest-api#using-link-headers). If specified, the query only searches for results after this cursor.

spaces.description: The list of Copilot Spaces on this page of results.
